---
name: 📋 Development Task
about: Track a specific technical task or implementation.
title: 'Task: [Short summary]'
labels: task
assignees: ''
---

### Objective
Provide a brief summary of what this task aims to achieve.

### Checklist
- [ ] Task sub-item 1
- [ ] Task sub-item 2

### Technical Notes
Add any specific architecture references, files to modify, or dependencies to consider.

### Definition of Done
- [ ] Code builds without errors
- [ ] Verification tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] PR reviewed and merged
